## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly operations team sync to align on goals, share updates, and foster collaboration across departments.](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team is globally distributed (US, Brazil, Germany, Kenya) with varying work hours, but all have morning overlap](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Company recently transitioned from LLC to C-Corp, causing ongoing administrative adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Key focuses: banking partner selection, employee classification policy, variable compensation structure, and office space in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Recruitment processes being overhauled with new ATS implementation and AI workflow integration](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Work Schedules

  - [Team members introduced themselves and shared their locations/time zones](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Work hours vary but generally align with PST morning hours for overlap](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Use of @growthx.ai vs @growthxlabs.com emails discussed; some legacy systems still use old domain](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Finance and Operations Updates

  - [Bridget: Selecting bank partner for $12M Series A funds, developing employee classification policy, structuring variable compensation](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Erickson: Migrating expenses to new corporate structure, drafting AP policy, correcting revenue recognition in accounting system](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

### Recruitment Process Improvements

  - [Marília: Calibrating screening process, organizing Workable pipelines, learning job posting workflow](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Tucker: Identifying new ATS, planning migration from Workable, building sourcing projects, cleaning up pending candidates](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

### IT and Automation Initiatives

  - [Yousef: Developing hire automation workflows, planning SF office tech setup, working on notion integration for onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

### Office Space

  - [Plans for new San Francisco office, primarily for events and flexible workspace](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
  - [Lease potentially signed by end of month](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget, Tucker, and Marília to meet tomorrow to finalize employee classification policy](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Tucker to continue ATS evaluation and coordinate with Daniel on AI workflow integration](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Yousef to progress on hire automation and discuss SF office plans with Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Team to provide feedback on contractor vs. employee proposal at next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [All to be mindful of Tucker's limited availability until official April 7th start date](https://fathom.video/share/M-smcg3iF83LzyU5yRMi72PksG27KC7x?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)
